case_title: FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY vs. LIEBERMAN, ELDAD et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT LIEBERMAN, ELDAD DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          DEC-03-1999 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-01-1999 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       NOV-15-1999
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY SERVED SEP-07-1999, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LIEBERMAN, ELDAD
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF DEC-03-1999, CONTINUED TO JAN-07-2000 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 212 FOR ANSWER OR ENTRY OF DEFAULT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JAN-07-2000, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN ANSWER OR ENTER DEFAULT. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY SEAN DITHOMAS. HEARING SET FOR FEB-16-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF FEB-16-2000, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON FEB-16-2000, TO OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT. NO DEFAULT SHALL BE ENTERED UNTIL SANCTIONS ARE PAID. OSC AND SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY SEAN R DITHOMAS, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING DATE., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAR-02-2000 CONTINUED FROM FEB-16-2000 TO APR-05-2000 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
OSC CALENDAR OF APR-05-2000, OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED ON APRIL 5,2000.
